# Maintainers

This file lists the current maintainers of this repository.

| Name | GitHub | Area | Contact |
|------|--------|------|---------|
| Aric Camarata | @aric-camarata | Founder / All areas | aric.camarata@gmail.com |

## Becoming a Maintainer

Maintainers are contributors who have demonstrated a consistent track record of quality contributions, code reviews, and community engagement. The path to maintainership:

1. Make multiple accepted pull requests that demonstrate understanding of the codebase.
2. Participate in code review and GitHub Discussions over several months.
3. Be nominated by an existing maintainer.
4. Be approved by the founder.

No formal timeline. Quality and trust matter more than quantity.

## Responsibilities

Maintainers are expected to:

- Review pull requests in their assigned area within 5 business days.
- Triage new issues and label them appropriately.
- Uphold the Code of Conduct.
- Follow the governance model described in [GOVERNANCE.md](GOVERNANCE.md).

## Emeritus Maintainers

No emeritus maintainers yet.
